params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the Collidable component class - 'x', 'y', 'dx', 'dy', 'allowlist', 'denylist', 'apply_pos_fix_to_allowlist', 'apply_pos_fix_to_denylist', 'accept_pos_fix_from_allowlist', 'accept_pos_fix_from_denylist', 'position_fix_walkaround_mode'.

allowlist.title: Collision Allowlist
allowlist.description: List of entities which can collide with entity. ['ALL'] for all entities.

denylist.title: Collision Denylist
denylist.description: List of entities which can not collide with entity. ['ALL'] for all entities.

apply_pos_fix_to_allowlist.title: Apply Collision Allowlist
apply_pos_fix_to_allowlist.description: Apply fixing of position of others only in this allowlist upon hitting this entity.

apply_pos_fix_to_denylist.title: Apply Collision Denylist
apply_pos_fix_to_denylist.description: Do not apply fixing of position of others only in this denylist upon hitting this entity.

accept_pos_fix_from_allowlist.title: Accept Collision Allowlist
accept_pos_fix_from_allowlist.description: Accept fixing of entity's position from entities in allowlist only.

accept_pos_fix_from_denylist.title: Accept Collision Denylist
accept_pos_fix_from_denylist.description: Do not accept fixing of entity's position from entities in denylist only.

position_fix_walkaround_mode.title: Walkaround Mode
position_fix_walkaround_mode.description: Should the entity walkaround the other entity upon collision
